response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrable domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking — their background is primarily in web, mobile, and open-source tools using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated commitment to testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Absence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server/Oracle in financial contexts
